Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests

Class AbstractTransformerTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.AbstractTransformerTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
DatatypeTranslationTests, ExtensionTranslationTests, LanguageFilterTest, SequentSimplifierTest, SimpleSequentTests, TrackedPredicateTests
public class AbstractTransformerTests extends Object
Common stuff for tests of sequent transformations.
